name: Stand-Off
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>実</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>伯</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>仲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up Attack Position Effect Monster on each side of the field; if both monsters are still face-up on the field, negate their effects, then if both their effects were negated by this effect, as long as those monsters are in face-up Attack Position, they cannot be destroyed by battle, are unaffected by other card effects, also they cannot attack or change their battle positions.
eff: Target 1 face-up Attack Position Effect Monster on each side of the field; if both monsters are still face-up on the field, negate their effects, then if both their effects were negated by this effect, as long as those monsters are in face-up Attack Position, they cannot be destroyed by battle, are unaffected by other card effects, also they cannot attack or change their battle positions.

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
